description: In this live session, George introduces his guests Louis Captic and Robert, who share their experiences in the crypto space and discuss the Binance exchange. Louis, a Binance angel from Nairobi, emphasizes the importance of cryptocurrency education, while Robert, a digital asset enthusiast, highlights the future of digital currencies in Africa. The session includes a presentation about Binance and encourages audience interaction.
topic_summary: George hosts a live discussion with guests Louis and Robert about their crypto journeys and the Binance exchange, focusing on education and the future of digital currencies in Africa. [t=30:06] [t=93:89] [t=130:19]
